definitions: It was done to support or benefit a good and important purpose.
examples: The charity event was in aid of a worthwhile cause.
The fundraising efforts were in aid of a worthwhile cause.
All proceeds from the concert were in aid of a worthwhile cause.
lemma: it is in aid of a worthwhile cause
synonyms: it was for a good cause
it was for a noble purpose
source: it was in aid of a worthwhile cause
